source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-151 Manufacturing Information (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturing information for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detectors, including manufacturing processes, final product testing, raw materials, manufacturing site, suppliers, subcontractors, and attachments.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by identifying device information, manufacturing flow, final product testing specifications, raw materials, manufacturing process site, suppliers, subcontractors, and related attachments.
keyPoints: Product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Models are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The flow of manufacturing process is the same for all three models.
Final product testing includes mechanical test, electrical safety test, performance test, and combination test.
Manufacturing process site is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.

concepts.name: Manufacturing process
concepts.evidence: Flow chart of manufacturing process The flow of manufacturing process is the same for all three models (A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW).

concepts.name: Intended purpose
concepts.evidence: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

concepts.name: Principle of operation
concepts.evidence: The X-ray output from the X-ray generator passes through the object to be photographed and is then converted into a digital signal through the detector to be output to the image signal.

concepts.name: Final product testing
concepts.evidence: Testing items of final product Mechanical test Electrical safety test Performance test

concepts.name: Electrical safety inspection
concepts.evidence: Electrical Safety Inspection Leakage current test Withstand voltage test Earth Resistance Test Power input test

concepts.name: Supplier qualification
concepts.evidence: Evidence of qualification Domestic Supplier Assessment (APF704-2), Overseas Supplier Assessment (APF704-3)

evidence.claim: The document covers the product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered model names are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The detectors are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors designed for digital radiography systems.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors that have been designed for faster, more streamlined approach to digital radiography systems.

evidence.claim: The detectors consist of TFT, CsI scintillator, and an electronic device that converts read data into digital signals.
evidence.evidenceText: The detector consists of TFT and Scintillator (CsI) and an electronic device that converts data read through it into digital signals.

evidence.claim: The detectors support auto exposure detection technology for use without generator integration.
evidence.evidenceText: The detectors support an auto exposure detection technology that allows the detectors to be used without generator integration.

evidence.claim: The intended purpose is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The products are intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and support real time diagnosis and treatment planning.
evidence.evidenceText: It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnosis and treatment planning on a real time basis for physicians and radiologists.

evidence.claim: The manufacturing process flow is the same for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: The flow of manufacturing process is the same for all three models (A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW).

evidence.claim: Final product testing includes mechanical test, electrical safety test, performance test, and combination test.
evidence.evidenceText: Testing items of final product Mechanical test Electrical safety test Performance test ... Combination test

evidence.claim: Final product testing data is referenced in Final Inspection Test Report A-QI-0-009.
evidence.evidenceText: Data of final product testing Refer to Final Inspection Test Report (A-QI-0-009)

evidence.claim: Electrical Safety Inspection includes leakage current, withstand voltage, earth resistance, and power input tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrical Safety Inspection Leakage current test Withstand voltage test Earth Resistance Test Power input test

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is identified as the manufacturing process site for development, manufacturing, storage, sales, and service.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz Co., Ltd. 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea Digital flat panel X-ray detector development, manufacturing, storage, sales and service
